title: Collective Culture Back To Back
description: Collective Culture is taking over Ironworks Studios for Back to Back - a night where Jazz, R&B, Hip Hop & Soul collide with movement and words that hit deep. Hosted by the unapologetically hilarious Thanyia Moore, this isn’t just a show - it’s a full-on creative takeover. Expect powerful performances, raw talent and an atmosphere that’ll have you vibing all night. The stunning line-up of performers curated by Munya Muchati includes: AFLO. the poet, Erin James, Frankie Jean, Imani Ruiz, IMMACULATE, Mariam Hussein, Melissa James, Nathaniel Baker, Pearl Makayi, Riphco plus dance company Visual Artists. THIS EVENT IS SUPPORTED BY ARTS COUNCIL ENGLAND, THE IRENE MENSAH BURSARY & FLO CREATIVE IN COLLABORATION WITH IRONWORKS STUDIO.
